mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureStdntMapper.selectPassYCnt */ select count(*) from t_lecture_stdnt where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and pass_yn='Y'
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureStdntMapper.selectByPk */ select * from t_lecture_stdnt where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureStdntMapper.deleteByPk */ delete from t_lecture_stdnt where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and user_id=#{userId}
